title: Food&Potions
description: Plugin that allows player to put effects on the food!
body:
Plugin, that allows you to put effects on the food! Sounds good, right? It is.

## Config:
Theres a 3 values, that u can change whatever u want
1. **balanced-effects (boolean)** - If true, effects on the food will be always level one.
2. **foodLevel (int)** - How much saturation effected food will provide.
3. **banned-effects (list)** - Banned effects (Only for food, will not be applied to it)

Also, theres a one new command: **/foodwithpotions reload** (requires **foodWPotions.reload** permission) - allows you to reload plugin's config.
